summary: Russell arrives at Silverstone armed with the confidence of his Austrian masterclass, seeking to convert Mercedes' momentum into a home victory against Hamilton's resurgent Ferrari. Antonelli's sprint-race brilliance and Hamilton's practice pace suggest a three-way Mercedes-Ferrari battle will dominate track position throughout the weekend. A strong result for Russell would consolidate Mercedes' championship charge, while Hamilton's return to form raises questions about Ferrari's title credentials heading into the season's second half.
